validation.target-outside-project: Folder path cannot leave the project root.
validation.target-unsupported-character: Folder path contains unsupported control characters.
validation.cronField: Cron field {field} is outside its valid range or uses unsupported syntax.
trigger.label: Trigger
trigger.cronHint: Minute, hour, day of month, month, day of week.
trigger.summary.manual: Runs only when you start it manually.
trigger.summary.realtime: Runs when the source reports a change.
trigger.nextRunCustom: The next run follows this custom schedule.
resource.fallback.empty: This source does not expose browsable resources. Enter its resource details instead.
resource.fallback.unavailable: Resource browsing is unavailable for this source. You can still enter its resource details.
resource.fallback.manual: Enter the source resource details manually.
destination.folderLoadFailed: Folders could not be loaded. You can still type a path.
template.generic.title: Automate {source}
template.generic.description: Keep {source} data current in this project.
template.google-docs.title: Collect Google Docs
template.google-docs.description: Bring shared documents into this project and refresh them when the source changes.
template.google-sheets.title: Import Google Sheets
template.google-sheets.description: Bring operational tables into a project folder for analysis, agents, and reporting.
template.gmail-updates.title: Capture Gmail updates
template.gmail-updates.description: Keep important messages and recurring updates available as durable project context.
template.web-research.title: Track a web source
template.web-research.description: Save a web page into this project and keep its research context up to date.
template.calendar-events.title: Collect Calendar events
template.calendar-events.description: Turn selected events and schedules into structured, searchable project context.
template.search-console.title: Monitor Search Console
template.search-console.description: Bring search performance signals into the project for recurring analysis and reporting.
template.notion-knowledge.title: Mirror Notion knowledge
template.notion-knowledge.description: Keep selected pages and databases mirrored in a searchable project folder.
template.slack-channels.title: Archive Slack channels
template.slack-channels.description: Capture important messages and threads as durable, searchable project knowledge.
template.linear-projects.title: Mirror Linear projects
template.linear-projects.description: Keep issues, projects, and status updates available as structured project context.
template.airtable-bases.title: Mirror Airtable bases
template.airtable-bases.description: Turn selected records and views into versioned, queryable project data.
template.supabase-tables.title: Snapshot Supabase tables
template.supabase-tables.description: Bring the tables your team needs into a controlled project data surface.
page.title: Automations
page.description: Keep project knowledge current by watching external sources and importing them into project folders.
page.addMoreDescription: Connect another external source to a project folder.
page.noSourcesInCategory: No available sources in this category.
page.noMatchingAutomations: No Automations match the selected source.
connection.title: {name} · {path}
connection.readingAccount: Reading the connection for this signed-in Cloud account.
connection.finishInBrowser: Finish connecting {provider} in your browser. This window will continue automatically.
create.description.choose: Choose one external source; you can return here from any configuration.
create.description.connect: Authorization happens in your browser; no Automation is created until configuration is complete.
create.description.resolving: Checking the signed-in account before configuration.
create.description.configure: Choose the {provider} data, project folder, and trigger.
create.chooseSourceHint: Choose the external source this Automation will watch.
create.sourceUnavailable: This Automation source is no longer available.
create.sourceMissing: Choose a source resource or enter its ID.
create.ready: Ready to create Automation and queue its first sync.
create.error.queue-unavailable: The Automation was not created because its first sync could not be queued. Check the Cloud worker and try again. {detail}
create.error.authorization: {provider} authorization failed. Go back, reconnect the account, then try again. {detail}
create.error.generic: The Automation could not be created. Review the source and folder settings, then try again. {detail}
manage.title: {source} to {target}
manage.confirmDeleteDescription: Scheduling and future imports will stop. Files already imported into the project will stay in place.
manage.sourceMissing: Choose or enter a source resource.
